title: Hippo's Better Adventures+
description: A modpack that improves a lot of aspects of minecraft, including sound, visuals, exploration, and of course performance, while feeling very vanilla at the same time.
body:
# Hippo's Better Adventures
**Hippo's Better Adventures** is a modpack focused on making the whole game experience better. I included **over 100 mods** that I feel make the game feel more full and fun, while also feeling super **vanilla**.*

_*Actually there are no content mods in the whole pack so you can use the pack on most servers, and vanilla clients can join you without having to use the mods._
## Mods And Features
⚠️**This is not all of the mods**⚠️
#### Performance

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Includes most performance mods your favorite optimization modpacks use such as:
- **Sodium & Lithium**
- Entity Culling & More Culling
- Noisium
- FerriteCore
- Memory Leak Fix
- ImmediatelyFast
- ModernFix
- LazyDFU

</details>


#### Optifine Replacements

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **Iris for shader support**
- CIT Resewn for custom item textures
- Animatica for animated item textures
- **Zoomify for zooming**
- Capes for... capes 
- Continuity for connected textures
- OptiGUI for custom GUIs
- Polytone for color related changes
- FabricSkyboxes for custom skyboxes
- **LambDynamicLights for dynamic lights**
- EMF & ETF for custom entity models and textures, and Enhanced Block Entities for custom block entity models and textures

</details>


#### Sound Enhancements

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **AmbientSounds**
- **Auditory Continued**
- Drip Sounds
- Presence Footsteps
- **Sound Physics Remastered**

</details>


#### Camers, Visual, and Atmosphere

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Photos taken with BSL shaders
- Better Third Person
- Blur+
- **Camera Overhaul**
- Falling leaves
- **Visuality**

</details>


#### World

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Amplified Nether
- Nullscape
- **Tectonic**
- **Terralith**
- Towns and Towers
- **All of YUNG's mods**

</details>


#### Utility, QOL, and Other

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **AppleSkin**
- Better Mount HUD
- Better Statistics Screen
- **BetterF3**
- Chat Heads
- Cherished Worlds
- Chunky
- Controlling
- CraftPresence
- **Cubes Without Borders**
- Debugify
- **Do a Barrel Roll**
- **Dynamic Crosshair**
- Dynamic FPS
- **Eating Animation**
- Enchantment Descriptions
- Fabrishot
- **FallingTree**
- FastQuit
- **First-person Model**
- InvMove
- **Just Enough Items**
- Just Enough Resources
- Language Reload
- Model Gap Fix
- ModernFix
- More Chat History
- **Mouse Tweaks**
- Not Enough Animations
- **ReplayMod**
- **Resourcify**
- Searchables
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- **Simple Voice Chat**
- Translations for Sodium
- Vanilla Refresh
- Wavey Capes
- **e4mc**

</details>

## Info
There is also a file named SERVER that contains only the mods needed for running an optimized server with all world mods and simple voice chat, like the client pack has, along with the config that this pack includes for the client.
